label: DeFi Swap
description: Swap tokens with route preview, price impact, slippage control, and gas estimate. Supports basis trade mode.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Error boundary via WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx. requiredEntitlements and availableOn set. No any types or @ts-ignore. No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file (generateSwapRoute and getMockPrice come from useDeFiData() context). Loading/empty state added: Skeleton rendered when tokens.length === 0. Error state covered by FormWidget (submission errors) and WidgetErrorBoundary (context errors). No dead code.

1.1.note: Widget reads all data via useDeFiData() hook exclusively. 1.2: defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() and derives hasDefiDesk from globalScope.organizationIds. 1.3: Org filter gates hasDefiDesk — when org without DeFi access selected, token balances zero out and lending protocols return empty. 1.4: clientIds field exists in GlobalScopeState but defi-data-context does not currently filter by clientIds — partial gap, swap widget itself is not client-filtered (strategy-level widget). 1.5: Strategy filter wired via scopeStrategyIds — ledger orders in tradeHistory filtered by strategyIds. 1.6: Empty scope arrays return all data (hasDefiDesk defaults to true when organizationIds.length === 0). 1.7: Token lists (SWAP_TOKENS) live in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-swap.ts — not yet in lib/constants/ or lib/config/; reference data location is an open finding (context owns this, not the widget).

l1.notes: 1.1: Widget reads all data via useDeFiData() hook exclusively. 1.2: defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() and derives hasDefiDesk from globalScope.organizationIds. 1.3: Org filter gates hasDefiDesk — when org without DeFi access selected, token balances zero out and lending protocols return empty. 1.4: clientIds field exists in GlobalScopeState but defi-data-context does not currently filter by clientIds — partial gap, swap widget itself is not client-filtered (strategy-level widget). 1.5: Strategy filter wired via scopeStrategyIds — ledger orders in tradeHistory filtered by strategyIds. 1.6: Empty scope arrays return all data (hasDefiDesk defaults to true when organizationIds.length === 0). 1.7: Token lists (SWAP_TOKENS) live in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-swap.ts — not yet in lib/constants/ or lib/config/; reference data location is an open finding (context owns this, not the widget).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Relevant modes: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch: swap execution should be disabled.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope() but does not consume scope.mode. No mode-based switching.

3.5.note: Paper mode spec: Swap button disabled; route preview still visible.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget — route computed synchronously via useMemo.

l3.notes: 3.3/3.4: Human must verify batch-mode behavior. Swap mode wiring pending BP-5.

4.1.note: No dead buttons. Swap/reverse/slippage/algo buttons all functional.

5.1.note: Target strategies: CARRY_BASIS_PERP (basis-trade mode), CARRY_STAKED_BASIS (staked-basis mode), YIELD_ROTATION_LENDING (default swap). Props config.mode drives behavior.

l5.notes: 5.2-5.6: Human walkthrough required. Basis trade mode and staked-basis mode paths both need verification.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 11 tests covering render + loading branch, reactive expected-output, slippage options, gas-insufficiency warning, execute-button enable/disable and SWAP payload shape. See tests/widgets/defi/defi-swap-widget.test.tsx

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file. All data via useDeFiData().

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function found.

7.7.note: route useMemo deps stable [amountNum, tokenIn, tokenOut, algoType, selectedChain, generateSwapRoute]. No inline objects in deps.

8.1.note: text-[10px] at lines 271, 301, 304 migrated to text-micro utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) added to globals.css @theme.

8.2.note: No p-[...] or gap-[...] arbitrary spacing.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Input, Select, Badge, Separator from components/ui/*. FormWidget used.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt. Inputs have label wrappers. Human: keyboard pass required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Swap is a distinct action (token exchange). Basis-trade mode is config-driven via props, not a separate widget.

relationships.notes: Can be configured as basis-trade or staked-basis mode via props.config.mode.

dataContract.notes: Route generation is on-demand via generateSwapRoute from context. Production: SOR (Smart Order Router) REST endpoint.

gaps.notes: ARBITRAGE_PRICE_DISPERSION §11 DeFi/lp: Flash-loan receiver contract per-chain registry missing from UAC; deployed on testnet only on some chains
ARBITRAGE_PRICE_DISPERSION §11 DeFi/option: No supported DeFi options venue
CARRY_BASIS_PERP §6 DeFi/spot + perp (cross chain): Bridge latency breaks LEADER_HEDGE deadline — needs longer max_hedge_delay_ms config + bridge state machine integration
LIQUIDATION_CAPTURE §12 DeFi/perp: Perp liquidations on DeFi perps have different economics than lending liquidations; code path exists but economics need separate UAC capability

findings.description: 0.5 (previously flagged) — widget destructures generateSwapRoute and getMockPrice from useDeFiData() context, not from lib/mocks/ directly. No direct mock import in widget file. Issue was already resolved in context wiring.
0.6/0.7 — No loading or empty state for token list. Added Skeleton guard when tokens.length === 0; all hooks moved above early return to preserve rules-of-hooks.
0.4 — Removed unnecessary `as string[]` cast on readonly swapTokens array.

1.4 — clientIds from globalScope not wired into defi-data-context filtering. Swap widget is strategy-scoped, client cascade is not implemented in the defi context. Open for future work in context file.

1.7 — SWAP_TOKENS reference data lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-swap.ts rather than lib/constants/ or lib/config/. Should be moved to lib/config/services/defi.config.ts in a future cleanup (context file change, out of scope for this cert pass).
